---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new Context Browser feature or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] <Short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: Pluglug
---

## Summary
- Clearly describe the feature you would like to see.

## Problem / Use Case
- What problem or limitation does this solve in Blender add-on development or scripting?
- Concrete example(s):

## Proposal
- What should Context Browser do differently?
- If possible, describe the UI or behavior.

## Alternatives
- Have you found any workarounds or similar tools?

## Additional Context
- Screenshots, mock-ups, reference links, or example context paths.
